input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.5.4.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.5.4.5
            TITLE: a capacitor may be used to hold the airs closed for up to 250 ms after the shutdown circuit

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.5.4.5: A capacitor may be used to hold the AIRs closed for up to 250 ms after the Shutdown Circuit
EV.5.4.5 A capacitor may be used to hold the AIRs closed for up to 250 ms after the Shutdown Circuit 
Opens  EV.7.2.2

final_answer: A capacitor may be used to hold the AIRs closed for up to 250 ms after the Shutdown Circuit
